creator: p5B2EA84B3@t-online.de
text:
(In reply to Eric Camachat from comment #4)
Tried keepassxc and there is exactly the same problem as in keepassx:

A test entry has username test@test.com	and password @€µ{}[]\

Now auto-type makes this:
testqtest.com	qem7089ß

While doing manually copy username (ctrl+b ctrl+v) and copy password (ctrl+c ctrl+v) does it correctly:
test@test.com	@€µ{}[]\

What me really puzzles is, that no one else is complaining about.
Any hint is greatly appreciated how to track that problem.
